query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN shippingAddress IS NOT NULL AND shippingAddress != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_address, SUM(CASE WHEN shippingAddress IS NULL OR shippingAddress = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_address FROM mall_orders;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN shippingAddress IS NOT NULL AND shippingAddress != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_address, SUM(CASE WHEN shippingAddress IS NULL OR shippingAddress = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_address FROM mall_orders;
